rationale: Abstract X outperforms Y on every dimension by precisely naming the evidence gap (limited 1-year data), presenting results in logical sequence with clear denominators, and maintaining appropriate hedging throughout, while Y has a grammar error in the Objective and a vaguer background.
loser_weakness: Abstract Y lacked a specific, falsifiable knowledge gap in the Background — it described SBRT only as 'promising' without identifying what evidence was missing — and its Results section presented recurrence before efficacy, undermining clarity.
